ja.title: 野菜とクリーミーなラザニア野菜のラザニアベジタリアンのラザニア
ja.description:
私が使うもの..。
https://rapanelloelasuacucina.blogspot.com/2020/08/il-negozio-di-rapanello.html
__________________________________________________
野菜とクリーミーなラザニア野菜のラザニアベジタリアンのラザニア

野菜ラザニアの材料
あなたが好む野菜600グラム
ラザニアのパスタ
1リットルのベシャメル

すべての野菜を立方体に切ります。
鍋、にんにく、オリーブオイル、野菜に入れます。
ふたをして10分煮ます。
ベシャメルを作る
ミルク1リットル
コーンスターチ70グラム
少し塩
70グラムのコーンスターチをコップ半分の冷水と混ぜます。
ミルクを茹でます。
ミルクが熱くなったら、でんぷんを加えます。
30秒混ぜるとベシャメルの準備が整います。

調理した野菜とベシャメルを混ぜます。
おろし金150グラムのチーズ
野菜とチーズでラザニアの層を作ります。
少なくとも5層。
予熱したオーブンで170度で30分焼きます。

Lasagna Uachtar le glasraí Lasagna Glasraí Lasagna glasraí

Comhábhair don lasagna glasraí
na glasraí is fearr leat 600 gram
pasta do lasagna
1 lítear bechamel

Gearr na glasraí go léir i gciúbanna.
cuir iad i bpanna, gairleog, ola olóige agus glasraí.
Cócaráil le clúdach ar feadh 10 nóiméad.
Déan an béchamel
Lítear bainne
70 gram de stáirse arbhar
salann beag
Measc 70 gram de cornstarch le leath gloine uisce fuar.
Boil an bainne.
Nuair a bhíonn an bainne te, cuir an stáirse leis.
Measc 30 soicind agus tá an béchamel réidh.

Measc na glasraí bruite leis an bechamel.
Grater 150 gram de cháis
Déan na sraitheanna lasagna leis na glasraí agus an cáis.
5 shraith ar a laghad.
bácáil in oigheann réamhthéite ag 170 céim ar feadh 30 nóiméad.

לזניה שמנת עם ירקות לזניה ירקות לזניה צמחונית

רכיבים ללזניה הירקית
את הירקות שאתה מעדיף 600 גרם
פסטה לזניה
1 ליטר בכמל

חותכים את כל הירקות לקוביות.
שים אותם בתבנית, שום, שמן זית וירקות.
מבשלים עם מכסה במשך 10 דקות.
הכינו את הבשמל
ליטר חלב
70 גרם עמילן תירס
מעט מלח
מערבבים 70 גרם עמילן תירס עם חצי כוס מים קרים.
מרתיחים את החלב.
כשהחלב חם מוסיפים את העמילן.
מערבבים 30 שניות והבשמל מוכן.

מערבבים את הירקות המבושלים עם הבשמל.
פומפיה 150 גרם גבינה
הכינו את שכבות הלזניה עם הירקות והגבינה.
לפחות 5 שכבות.
אופים בתנור שחומם מראש לחום של 170 מעלות למשך 30 דקות.

zh.title: 烤宽面条与蔬菜奶油蔬菜烤宽面条素食烤宽面条
zh.description:
我使用的东西...
https://rapanelloelasuacucina.blogspot.com/2020/08/il-negozio-di-rapanello.html
__________________________________________________
烤宽面条与蔬菜奶油蔬菜烤宽面条素食烤宽面条

蔬菜烤宽面条的成分
您偏爱的蔬菜600克
烤宽面条的面食
1公升调味酱

将所有蔬菜切成小块。
将它们放在锅中，放入大蒜，橄榄油和蔬菜。
盖上盖子煮10分钟。
制作调味酱
一升牛奶
70克玉米淀粉
小盐
将70克玉米淀粉与半杯冷水混合。
煮牛奶。
当牛奶变热时，添加淀粉。
混合30秒钟，调味酱已准备就绪。

将煮熟的蔬菜与调味酱混合。
刨丝器150克奶酪
用蔬菜和奶酪做千层面。
至少5层。
在170度的预热烤箱中烤30分钟。
___________________________________________________

en-US.title: Lasagna Creamy with vegetables Vegetable lasagna Vegetarian lasagna
en-US.description:
The Things I Use ...
https://rapanelloelasuacucina.blogspot.com/2020/08/il-negozio-di-rapanello.html
__________________________________________________
Lasagna Creamy with vegetables Vegetable lasagna Vegetarian lasagna

Ingredients for the vegetable lasagna
the vegetables you prefer 600 grams
pasta for lasagna
1 liter of bechamel

Cut all the vegetables into cubes.
put them in a pan, garlic, olive oil and vegetables.
Cook with lid for 10 minutes.
Make the béchamel
A liter of milk
70 grams of corn starch
little salt
Mix 70 grams of cornstarch with half a glass of cold water.
Boil the milk.
When the milk is hot, add the starch.
Mix 30 seconds and the béchamel is ready.

Mix the cooked vegetables with the bechamel.
Grater 150 grams of cheese
Make the lasagna layers with the vegetables and cheese.
at least 5 layers.
bake in a preheated oven at 170 degrees for 30 minutes.

es-MX.title: Lasaña Cremosa con verduras Lasaña de verduras Lasaña vegetariana
es-MX.description:
Las cosas que uso ...
https://rapanelloelasuacucina.blogspot.com/2020/08/il-negozio-di-rapanello.html
__________________________________________________
Lasaña Cremosa con verduras Lasaña de verduras Lasaña vegetariana

Ingredientes para la lasaña de verduras
las verduras que prefieras 600 gramos
pasta para lasaña
1 litro de bechamel

Corta todas las verduras en cubos.
ponerlos en una sartén, el ajo, el aceite de oliva y las verduras.
Cocine con tapa durante 10 minutos.
Hacer la bechamel
Un litro de leche
70 gramos de maicena
un poco de sal
Mezclar 70 gramos de maicena con medio vaso de agua fría.
Hervir la leche.
Cuando la leche esté caliente, agregue el almidón.
Mezclar 30 segundos y la bechamel está lista.

Mezclar las verduras cocidas con la bechamel.
Rallador 150 gramos de queso
Hacer las capas de lasaña con las verduras y el queso.
al menos 5 capas.
hornee en un horno precalentado a 170 grados durante 30 minutos.
___________________________________________________

lv.description:
Lietas, kuras izmantoju ...
https://rapanelloelasuacucina.blogspot.com/2020/08/il-negozio-di-rapanello.html
__________________________________________________
Lazanja Krēmveida ar dārzeņiem Dārzeņu lazanja Veģetārā lazanja

Sastāvdaļas dārzeņu lazanjai
dārzeņi, kurus vēlaties 600 gramus
makaroni lazanjai
1 litrs bešamela

Visus dārzeņus sagriež kubiņos.
ielieciet tos pannā, ķiplokus, olīveļļu un dārzeņus.
Vāra ar vāku 10 minūtes.
Pagatavojiet bešamelu
Litrs piena
70 grami kukurūzas cietes
maz sāls
Sajauc 70 gramus kukurūzas cietes ar pusi glāzes auksta ūdens.
Vāra pienu.
Kad piens ir karsts, pievienojiet cieti.
Sajauc 30 sekundes, un bešamels ir gatavs.

Gatavos dārzeņus sajauciet ar bešamelu.
Rīvē 150 gramus siera
Pagatavojiet lazanjas slāņus ar dārzeņiem un sieru.
vismaz 5 slāņi.
cep iepriekš uzkarsētā cepeškrāsnī 170 grādos 30 minūtes.

τα λαχανικά που προτιμάτε 600 γραμμάρια
ζυμαρικά για λαζάνια
1 λίτρο μπεσαμέλ

Κόψτε όλα τα λαχανικά σε κύβους.
τα βάζουμε σε ένα τηγάνι, σκόρδο, ελαιόλαδο και λαχανικά.

Ένα λίτρο γάλακτος

λίγο αλάτι

Όταν το γάλα είναι ζεστό, προσθέστε το άμυλο.
Ανακατέψτε 30 δευτερόλεπτα και η μπεσαμέλ είναι έτοιμη.

Τρίψτε 150 γραμμάρια τυριού

Faire la béchamel
Un litre de lait

Râper 150 grammes de fromage
Préparez les couches de lasagnes avec les légumes et le fromage.

cuire au four préchauffé à 170 degrés pendant 30 minutes.

bs.title: Lazanje kremaste sa povrćem Lazanje sa povrćem Vegetarijanske lazanje
bs.description:
Stvari koje koristim ...
https://rapanelloelasuacucina.blogspot.com/2020/08/il-negozio-di-rapanello.html
__________________________________________________
Lazanje kremaste sa povrćem Lazanje sa povrćem Vegetarijanske lazanje

Sastojci za povrće lazanje
povrće koje više volite 600 grama
tjestenina za lazanje
1 litra bešamela

Narežite sve povrće na kockice.
stavite ih u šerpu, beli luk, maslinovo ulje i povrće.
Kuhajte s poklopcem 10 minuta.
Napravite bešamel
Litra mleka
70 grama kukuruznog škroba
malo soli
Pomiješajte 70 grama kukuruznog škroba sa pola čaše hladne vode.
Prokuhajte mleko.
Kad je mlijeko vruće, dodajte škrob.
Miješajte 30 sekundi i bešamel je spreman.

Pomiješajte kuhano povrće sa bešamelom.
Rende 150 grama sira
Napravite slojeve za lazanje sa povrćem i sirom.
najmanje 5 slojeva.
pecite u zagrijanoj rerni na 170 stepeni 30 minuta.
___________________________________________________
Komercijalna pošta

sl.description:
Stvari, ki jih uporabljam ...

________________________________________________
Lazanje Kremne z zelenjavo Zelenjavna lazanje Vegetarijanske lazanje

Sestavine za zelenjavno lazanjo
zelenjava, ki jo imate raje 600 gramov
testenine za lazanje
1 liter bešamela

Vso zelenjavo narežemo na kocke.
jih dajte v ponev, česen, olivno olje in zelenjavo.
Kuhajte s pokrovom 10 minut.
Naredite bešamel
Liter mleka
70 gramov koruznega škroba
malo soli
70 gramov koruznega škroba zmešajte s pol kozarca hladne vode.
Zavremo mleko.
Ko je mleko vroče, dodamo škrob.
Zmešajte 30 sekund in bešamel je pripravljen.

Kuhano zelenjavo zmešajte z bešamelom.
Rende 150 gramov sira
Narejte sloje lazanja z zelenjavo in sirom.
vsaj 5 slojev.
pečemo v ogreti pečici na 170 stopinj 30 minut.

snippet.title: Radhe | Trailer | Salman Khan | Disha Patani | Randeep Hooda | Jackie Shroff | Prabhudeva | 13 May
snippet.description:
Yeh Eid, #Radhe Ke Saath
Countdown starts now!

#RadheTrailerOutNow

#SalmanKhan #JackieShroff #DishaPatani #RadeepHooda #PrabhuDeva #SKFFilms #ZeeStudios #SohailKhan #Atul #ReelLifeProduction #ZeeMusicCompany #ZeePlexOfficial #ZEE5 
 
The film will have a  multi-format release & a wide theatrical release internationally on 13th May 2021. It will release in over 40 countries including Middle East, USA, Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, UK, Europe among others.

Directed by Prabhudeva 
Produced by Salma Khan, Sohail Khan, Reel Life Pvt.Ltd
Director of photography: Avananka Bose 
Screenplay: A.C Mugil & Vijay Maurya 
Dialogues: Vijay Maurya 
Music: Sajid Wajid, Devi Sri Prasad, Himesh Reshammiya
Editor: Ritesh Soni

Production design: Durga Prasad Mahapatra

Sound designer: Parikshit Lalwani & Kunal Mehta

snippet.title: First Video of NASA’s Ingenuity Mars Helicopter in Flight, Includes Takeoff and Landing (High-Res)
snippet.description:
In this video captured by NASA’s Perseverance rover, the agency's Ingenuity Mars Helicopter took the first powered, controlled flight on another planet on April 19, 2021. 

The rover was parked at “Van Zyl Overlook,” about 211 feet (64.3 meters) away in Mars' Jezero Crater and chronicled the flight operations with its cameras.

These images from the rover’s Mastcam-Z cameras show the helicopter hovering above the Red Planet's surface. During this first flight, the helicopter climbed to an altitude of 10 feet (3 meters), hovered, and then touched back down on the surface of Mars.
 
Ingenuity is a technology demonstration. The 4-pound (1.8-kilogram) rotorcraft will help determine whether future explorations on Mars could include an aerial perspective.

Perseverance touched down at "Octavia E. Butler Landing" with Ingenuity attached to its belly on Feb. 18, 2021. The helicopter was deployed to the surface on April 3.

For more information on Ingenuity, visit : https://mars.nasa.gov/technology/helicopter/.

For more information on Perseverance, visit: https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance.

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech/ASU/MSSS

snippet.title: PATATE bruciate dal freddo, come ci dobbiamo comportare, cosa possiamo fare
snippet.description:
Spesso l'arrivo delle gelate primaverili causano danni ingenti all'agricoltura, sopratutto a colture che vegetano presto come le patate. Se subiamo questi danni dal freddo e dalle brinate cosa possiamo fare e cosa ci aspettiamo come raccolto?
